phase-0.notes: Modelo mental do repositorio — Phase 0 do analyze-and-improve. 145+ linhas MD + 320 linhas YAML com file:line references. Cobre goals, arquitetura (10 abstracoes, 5 relationships), patterns (20 canonical docs), terminologia (17 termos), curriculo (4 niveis, 8 conceitos) e gaps (11 gaps documentados).

phase-1.notes: Extracao de conhecimento — Phase 1. 211+ linhas MD + 338 linhas YAML. 5 frameworks, 7 patterns, 6 operational lessons, 7 tradeoffs, 7 failure patterns, synthesis com 5 insights emergentes.

phase-4.notes: Geracao de artefatos e roadmap — Phase 4.
